evidence.claim: Removes the file-writer destination unless manufacturer contains Zeiss, model contains iolmaster, and SOP Class UID is one of two supported values.

notes: Port 11118 collides with OpenEyes DICOM IOLMaster Channel. This channel appears current (inferred): it has AET-derived identifiers, source-platform logic and Zeiss/SOP routing, while the same-port named channel has no transformer. Both nevertheless write /mnt/dicom and POST PayloadProcessor, so the export does not show a file-only versus API-only split.

ack.detail: The HTTP response is the d5 destination result: an HL7 QBP^Q21 is sent by MLLP, its K21 response is converted to XML, XSLT transforms PID/PD1 fields into PatientList, and that XML is returned.
ack.evidence: Pennine | OpenEyes PAS Query | 06f0b8b8-5ea0-41a4-a0bc-04b89fb5193c | canonical/Pennine/OpenEyes PAS Query.xml | source responseVariable lines 20-22; Send Q21 lines 140-190; Convert K21 to XML script lines 395-401; Create response lines 498-578

field_map.note: Copied if non-empty, otherwise set to empty.
Selected from the K21 response by XSLT.
Selected from the K21 response by XSLT.

field_map.target: PatientList/Patient demographic, address, telephone, ethnic, death-date, practice and GP fields
field_map.note: Title case normalization; DOB/death date rendered YYYY-MM-DD; home address type becomes HOME; country is GB.

session_persistence.evidence: Pennine | OpenEyes PAS Query | 06f0b8b8-5ea0-41a4-a0bc-04b89fb5193c | canonical/Pennine/OpenEyes PAS Query.xml | HTTP Listener authType NONE lines 10-15; TCP Sender has no authentication settings lines 143-191; deploy/undeploy scripts lines 763-768

outbound_to: HTTP caller receives transformed PatientList XML

evidence.claim: The outbound template identifies QBP^Q21, HL7 version 2.4; response handling selects PID and optionally PD1 content from the returned K21 for XML output.
evidence.location: Pennine | OpenEyes PAS Query | 06f0b8b8-5ea0-41a4-a0bc-04b89fb5193c | canonical/Pennine/OpenEyes PAS Query.xml | outbound template line 76; Create response XSLT lines 531-578

notes: Despite sharing id 06f0b8b8 with PAS OUT at other sites, this export is an inbound HTTP-to-PAS demographic query adapter, not an OpenEyes API sender.

ack.detail: MLLP listener returns an auto-generated HL7 acknowledgement before processing; configured ACK/NACK control bytes are 06 and 15, with standard AA/AE/AR response generation properties.
ack.evidence: Pennine | OpenEyes PAS | 6c3a10d1-968d-468e-9355-008946825b20 | canonical/Pennine/OpenEyes PAS.xml | TCP listener source settings lines 16-38 and HL7 response generation lines 77-95

field_map.note: XSLT selection by assigning authority NHS.

field_map.target: Patient/HospitalNumber and Patient PUT path HospitalNumber
field_map.note: JavaScript also puts it in channelMap HospitalNumber.

Header is 1 for A08 and 0 otherwise.
